papers.title: DomainShuttle: Freeform Open Domain Subject-driven Text-to-video Generation
papers.abstract: Abstract DomainShuttle enables open domain subject-driven text-to-video generation with high fidelity and flexibility across in-domain and cross-domain scenarios through domain-aware modeling and dual RoPE schemes.  Generated by Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct Open domain subject-driven text-to-video (S2V) generation has drawn significant interest in academia and industry. Open domain S2V mainly involves two scenarios: in-domain, which requires retaining the reference subject features as much as possible, and cross-domain, which preserves the intrinsic features of the subject while allowing subject-irrelevant properties to vary flexibly according to the text prompt. Existing methods primarily focus on maximizing subject fidelity in in-domain scenarios, which limits their editability and adaptability in cross-domain scenarios, such as novel styles, semantic combinations, or domain attributes. In this study, we propose that an ideal S2V method should flexibly shuttle between different domains, achieving strong performance in both in-domain and cross-domain scenarios. To this end, we propose DomainShuttle, which could achieve high fidelity and generative flexibility for open domain video personalization. Specifically, we introduce Domain-MoT, which decouples videos and reference features and introduces the domain-aware AdaLN for domain-specific modeling of reference images. We then introduce the Video-Reference DualRoPE scheme, which places reference image tokens and video tokens in separate RoPE spaces to enable precise subject-level spatial modeling, and Cross-Pair Consistent Loss, which aims to extract intrinsic subject features unaffected by irrelevant features. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DomainShuttle achieves significant performance improvements over existing methods, exhibiting high subject fidelity and generative flexibility across diverse open domain application scenarios.
affiliations: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology

ru.title: Гибкий переход между доменами в персонализованной генерации видео
ru.desc: DomainShuttle решает задачу генерации видео из текста с сохранением характеристик заданного объекта (subject-driven text-to-video generation) в открытой области. Метод использует Domain-MoT для разделения видеоданных и эталонных признаков объекта с применением адаптивной нормализации слоёв (AdaLN), специфичной для каждого домена. Предложена схема Video-Reference DualRoPE, которая размещает токены эталонного изображения и видео в отдельных пространствах позиционного кодирования (RoPE) для точного пространственного моделирования. Метод достигает высокой точности воспроизведения объекта и гибкости генерации как в сценариях одного домена, так и при переносе стиля между доменами.

en.title: Flexibly Generating Videos Across Domains with DomainShuttle
en.desc: The paper presents DomainShuttle, a novel approach for generating videos from text prompts that can adapt to different subject domains. It addresses the challenges of maintaining subject fidelity in both in-domain and cross-domain scenarios, allowing for greater flexibility in video generation. The method introduces Domain-MoT for separating video and reference features, and a dual RoPE scheme for precise spatial modeling of subjects. Experimental results show that DomainShuttle outperforms existing techniques, achieving high-quality video generation with enhanced adaptability.

zh.title: 灵活跨域的文本到视频生成
zh.desc: DomainShuttle 是一种开放领域的文本到视频生成方法，能够在保持高保真度的同时灵活应对不同领域的需求。该方法通过领域感知建模和双重 RoPE 方案，实现了在同一领域和跨领域场景中的优异表现。与现有方法主要关注同一领域的特征保真度不同，DomainShuttle 允许在生成过程中灵活调整与主题无关的属性。实验结果表明，DomainShuttle 在多种开放领域应用场景中，显著提升了生成的灵活性和主题保真度。

papers.title: Beyond NL2Code: A Structured Survey of Multimodal Code Intelligence
papers.abstract: Abstract This survey explores multimodal code intelligence systems that generate and reason with code based on visual inputs, categorizing approaches across GUI, scientific visualization, structured graphics, and emerging frameworks while identifying verification-centered research directions.  Generated by Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct While Large Language Models (LLMs) have substantially advanced text-to-code synthesis, many real programming tasks specify intent through visual artifacts such as screenshots, charts, vector drawings, videos, and interactive states. These tasks require models to connect visual perception to executable programs, because correctness depends not only on syntax but also on layout, data semantics, interaction behavior, and domain-specific constraints that apply after execution. This survey examines Multimodal Code Intelligence, covering systems that generate, edit, refine, or reason with code under visually grounded inputs and outputs. We first formulate the field by the role that code plays in each task, distinguishing code as a rendered artifact, an editable symbolic structure, a scientific representation, an intermediate reasoning trace, or an executable policy or tool interface. We then organize benchmarks and methods into four domains: Graphical User Interface, Scientific Visualization, Structured Graphics, and Frontier Tasks and Frameworks. This taxonomy connects mature artifact-generation problems to emerging agentic and unified settings and allows us to compare how different tasks treat evidence of correctness. Looking ahead, we argue that future research may benefit from four verification-centered directions. Multi-signal validation can combine complementary evidence of correctness, multi-state verification can test behavior across execution trajectories, cross-task transfer testing can probe reusable visual-code skills, and verifiable agent traces can reveal whether agent actions are grounded in visual evidence. Together, these directions may move this field from single-output imitation toward evidence-grounded executable systems. An ongoing project and resources are available on https://github.com/xjywhu/Awesome-Multimodal-LLM-for-Code{GitHub}.

ru.title: От визуального восприятия к исполняемому коду: мультимодальный интеллект для программирования
ru.desc: Исследование посвящено системам мультимодального кодового интеллекта, которые генерируют и рассуждают о коде на основе визуальных входов, таких как скриншоты, диаграммы и чертежи. Авторы предлагают таксономию, организующую подходы по четырём доменам: графические интерфейсы пользователя, научная визуализация, структурированная графика и передовые фреймворки. Работа показывает, что корректность сгенерированного кода зависит не только от синтаксиса, но и от макета, семантики данных и поведения после выполнения. В заключение авторы предлагают четыре направления, центрированные на верификации: многосигнальная валидация, проверка над несколькими состояниями, трансфер обучения между задачами и отслеживаемые трассы агентов.

en.title: Bridging Visual Inputs and Code Generation for Enhanced Intelligence
en.desc: This paper surveys multimodal code intelligence systems that integrate visual inputs to generate and reason with code. It highlights the importance of connecting visual perception with executable programming, as many tasks require understanding not just syntax but also layout and semantics. The authors categorize existing approaches into four domains: Graphical User Interface, Scientific Visualization, Structured Graphics, and emerging frameworks. They propose future research directions focused on verification, emphasizing the need for multi-signal validation and cross-task transfer testing to enhance the reliability of these systems.

zh.title: 多模态代码智能：从模仿到基于证据的系统
zh.desc: 这篇论文调查了多模态代码智能系统，这些系统能够基于视觉输入生成和推理代码。研究将方法分为图形用户界面、科学可视化、结构化图形和新兴框架，并识别以验证为中心的研究方向。论文强调，生成的代码不仅要符合语法，还要考虑布局、数据语义和交互行为等因素。未来的研究可以通过多信号验证和跨任务转移测试等方向，推动这一领域向基于证据的可执行系统发展。

papers.title: Wan-Streamer v0.1: End-to-end Real-time Interactive Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Abstract Wan-Streamer is a unified, end-to-end multimodal model that enables real-time audio-visual interaction through causal attention mechanisms and integrated processing of visual, audio, and text modalities.  Generated by Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct We present Wan-Streamer, a native-streaming, end-to-end interactive foundation model designed from the ground up for real-time, low-latency, full-duplex audio-visual interaction. Wan-Streamer seamlessly models language, audio, and video as both input and output within a single Transformer, where the sequence is represented as interleaved visual, audio, and text input tokens together with visual, audio, and text output tokens, coordinated by block-causal attention for incremental streaming. Unlike cascaded interactive systems that rely on separate VAD, ASR, language, TTS, audio-driven animation, or video-generation modules, Wan-Streamer does not rely on external language, speech, avatar, or video-generation modules: perception, reasoning, generation, response timing, turn management, and cross-modal synchronization are learned jointly within one unified model, reducing pipeline latency and error accumulation. To support natural audio-visual responsiveness, we redesign the entire stack around streamability, including causal encoders, causal decoders, block-causal attention, and low-latency multimodal token scheduling, enabling streaming units as short as 160 ms at 25 fps. Wan-Streamer achieves approximately 200 ms model-side response latency and approximately 550 ms total interaction latency when combined with 350 ms bidirectional network latency, supporting sub-second duplex audio-visual communication. These results position Wan-Streamer as a unified, end-to-end, multimodal interactive foundation model for low-latency streaming interaction.

ru.title: Потоковое мультимодальное взаимодействие в реальном времени без внешних модулей
ru.desc: Wan-Streamer — это единая мультимодальная модель на основе Transformer, которая обрабатывает визуальную, аудио и текстовую информацию в режиме реального времени с минимальной задержкой. В отличие от каскадных систем, модель использует причинное внимание (block-causal attention) для инкрементного потокового вывода, позволяя обучать восприятие, рассуждение, генерацию и управление очередностью диалога в единой архитектуре. Архитектура переработана полностью для потоковой обработки — от причинных кодировщиков и декодировщиков до многомодального планирования токенов с периодом 160 мс при 25 fps. Система достигает латентности ответа около 200 мс со стороны модели и общей интерактивной латентности около 550 мс, обеспечивая полнодуплексное аудиовизуальное взаимодействие.

en.title: Real-Time Multimodal Interaction with Wan-Streamer
en.desc: Wan-Streamer is a cutting-edge multimodal model designed for real-time audio-visual interactions using causal attention mechanisms. It integrates visual, audio, and text modalities into a single Transformer architecture, allowing for seamless processing of inputs and outputs. By eliminating the need for separate modules for tasks like speech recognition or video generation, it reduces latency and minimizes errors in communication. With its innovative design, Wan-Streamer achieves low-latency interactions, making it ideal for applications requiring quick and responsive audio-visual exchanges.

zh.title: 实时低延迟的多模态交互模型
zh.desc: Wan-Streamer 是一个统一的端到端多模态模型，能够通过因果注意机制实现实时音视频交互。该模型将语言、音频和视频作为输入和输出，使用单一的 Transformer 进行处理，支持低延迟的全双工交互。与传统的分级交互系统不同，Wan-Streamer 不依赖外部模块，而是将感知、推理、生成等功能整合在一个模型中，从而减少延迟和错误累积。该模型的响应延迟约为 200 毫秒，支持亚秒级的音视频通信。

papers.title: Are We Ready For An Agent-Native Memory System?
papers.abstract: Abstract Large language model agents' memory systems have evolved into complex data management frameworks requiring systematic evaluation across multiple modules and workloads to understand their performance characteristics and trade-offs.  Generated by Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct Memory for large language model (LLM) agents has rapidly evolved from simple retrieval-augmented mechanisms into a data management system that supports persistent information storage, retrieval, update, consolidation, and dynamic lifecycle governance throughout agent execution. Despite this evolution, existing evaluations still benchmark agent memory mainly through end-to-end task success metrics (e.g., F1, BLEU), while treating the underlying system as a monolithic black box. As a result, critical system-level concerns, including operational costs, architectural trade-offs across memory modules, and robustness under dynamic knowledge updates, remain insufficiently explored. In this paper, we present a systematic experimental study of agent memory from a data management perspective. We propose an analytical framework that decomposes agent memory into four core modules: memory representation and storage, extraction, retrieval and routing, and maintenance. Under this framework, we evaluate 12 representative memory systems and two reference baselines across five benchmark workloads spanning 11 datasets. Our extensive end-to-end evaluation shows that no single architecture dominates across all scenarios; instead, effectiveness depends heavily on how well the memory structure aligns with the workload bottleneck. Furthermore, through fine-grained ablation studies, we quantify their individual effects on representation fidelity, retrieval precision, update correctness, and long-horizon stability. Finally, we reveal cost-performance trade-offs under realistic workloads, showing localized maintenance is more cost-efficient than global reorganization. Based on these findings, we identify promising directions towards building truly agent-native memory systems. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/OpenDataBox/MemoryData.

ru.title: Память агентов LLM как система управления данными: от оценки архитектур к оптимизации затрат
ru.desc: Статья представляет систематическое исследование систем памяти для агентов на основе LLM с позиции управления данными. Авторы предлагают аналитическую структуру, которая разделяет память агента на четыре ключевых модуля: представление и хранение данных, извлечение информации, поиск и маршрутизация, а также обслуживание памяти. Они оценили 12 различных систем памяти на пяти эталонных рабочих нагрузках, показав, что не существует универсальной архитектуры, и эффективность зависит от выравнивания структуры памяти с требованиями конкретной задачи. Исследование выявило компромиссы между стоимостью и производительностью, демонстрируя, что локальное обслуживание памяти более экономично, чем глобальная реорганизация.

en.title: Revolutionizing Memory Management in LLM Agents
en.desc: This paper explores the memory systems of large language model (LLM) agents, which have become complex frameworks for managing data. It critiques current evaluation methods that treat these systems as black boxes, focusing instead on a systematic analysis of their performance across various modules. The authors propose a new framework that breaks down memory into four key components and evaluates multiple memory systems against different workloads. Their findings highlight that no single architecture is superior; rather, performance is contingent on the alignment of memory structure with specific workload challenges.

zh.title: 优化大型语言模型的记忆系统
zh.desc: 本文探讨了大型语言模型代理的记忆系统，强调其复杂的数据管理框架。我们提出了一种分析框架，将代理记忆分解为四个核心模块：记忆表示与存储、提取、检索与路由、以及维护。通过对12个代表性记忆系统的系统评估，我们发现没有单一架构在所有场景中都表现最佳，效果依赖于记忆结构与工作负载瓶颈的匹配程度。最后，我们揭示了在现实工作负载下的成本与性能权衡，指出局部维护比全局重组更具成本效益。

papers.title: IV-CoT: Implicit Visual Chain-of-Thought for Structure-Aware Text-to-Image Generation
papers.abstract: Abstract Implicit Visual Chain-of-Thought decomposes visual conditioning into structural and semantic cascades for improved structure-aware image generation with sketch supervision.  Generated by Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct Unified multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved strong text-to-image generation quality, but still struggle with structure-aware prompt following, where object counts, spatial relations, attribute bindings, and coarse layouts must be preserved. We attribute this limitation in part to the entanglement of structural planning and appearance rendering within a single conditioning stream. To address this issue, we propose Implicit Visual Chain-of-Thought (IV-CoT), a latent visual reasoning framework for query-conditioned image generation. IV-CoT decomposes the visual conditioning queries into a structural-to-semantic cascade, where structural queries first form a latent visual plan and semantic queries then render appearance conditioned on this plan. To guide the structural queries, we introduce training-only sketch supervision, which encourages them to capture structure from sketches without requiring sketch extraction or intermediate decoding at inference time. IV-CoT performs implicit CoT reasoning in a single forward pass and achieves superior results on GenEval and T2I-CompBench. Visualizations and analyses demonstrate that the learned structural and semantic queries play complementary roles in structure-aware generation.

ru.title: Разделение структуры и внешнего вида для точной генерации изображений по тексту
ru.desc: В этой работе предлагается метод Implicit Visual Chain-of-Thought (IV-CoT) для улучшения генерации изображений с учётом структуры при использовании текстовых описаний. Авторы декомпозируют визуальное кондиционирование на два каскада: сначала структурные запросы создают скрытый визуальный план, затем семантические запросы рендерят внешний вид на основе этого плана. Для обучения структурных запросов используется супервизия эскизами, которая помогает модели захватывать структурную информацию без необходимости извлечения эскизов на этапе инференса. Метод достигает улучшенных результатов на бенчмарках GenEval и T2I-CompBench благодаря разделению задач планирования структуры и рендеринга внешнего вида.

en.title: Decoupling Structure and Appearance for Better Image Generation
en.desc: The paper introduces Implicit Visual Chain-of-Thought (IV-CoT), a novel framework for enhancing image generation by separating structural planning from appearance rendering. It addresses the challenges faced by multi-modal large language models in maintaining object counts, spatial relationships, and layouts during text-to-image generation. By using a cascade approach, IV-CoT first establishes a latent visual plan through structural queries, followed by semantic queries that focus on rendering the visual appearance. The framework utilizes sketch supervision during training to improve the model's ability to understand and generate structured images without needing complex extraction processes during inference.

zh.title: 隐式视觉思维链：提升图像生成的结构感知能力
zh.desc: 隐式视觉思维链（IV-CoT）将视觉条件分解为结构和语义级联，以提高基于草图监督的图像生成效果。该方法解决了多模态大语言模型在遵循结构提示时的局限性，特别是在物体数量、空间关系和属性绑定方面。IV-CoT通过先形成潜在视觉计划的结构查询和基于该计划渲染外观的语义查询来实现图像生成。通过训练时的草图监督，IV-CoT能够在推理时无需提取草图或中间解码，从而有效捕捉结构信息。

papers.title: Look Light, Think Heavy: What Multimodal Chain-of-Thought Reasoning Can and Cannot Do
papers.abstract: Abstract Multimodal Chain-of-Thought reasoning shows selective effectiveness across different tasks, with limitations in maintaining visual introspection during reasoning processes.  Generated by Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct Chain-of-Thought (CoT) has become a standard method for improving reasoning capabilities in large language models (LLMs) by eliciting step-by-step thinking, but its effectiveness in multimodal tasks remains unclear. In this paper, we aim to systematically investigate the key question: What can multimodal Chain-of-Thought reasoning do, and where and why does it fall short? To this end, we evaluate 12 multimodal tasks across perception and reasoning categories using both 14 non-reasoning models and 8 reasoning models. Our analysis reveals several important findings: (1) CoT is not a free lunch and should be used selectively depending on the specific requirements of each task. For perception tasks, CoT can lead to undesirable side effects, such as reduced performance in visual grounding and object counting. In contrast, it proves effective for reasoning tasks involving mathematical, scientific, and multi-image reasoning; (2) Compared to original models, existing open-source multimodal reasoning models often yield only marginal overall improvements, possibly due to an overemphasis on mathematical reasoning at the expense of broader capabilities; (3) Visual reasoning remains a key bottleneck for current multimodal CoT, as models exhibit a Look Light, Think Heavy pattern where verbal reflection rises and falls during reasoning, whereas visual reflection consistently diminishes. These findings suggest that while multimodal CoT handles verbal reflection relatively well, it lacks the ability to maintain deep visual introspection throughout the reasoning process.

ru.title: Когда слова помогают, но глаза слепнут: пределы мультимодального рассуждения
ru.desc: В статье проводится систематическое исследование эффективности цепочки рассуждений (Chain-of-Thought) в мультимодальных моделях обработки изображений и текста. Авторы оценивают 12 различных задач с использованием 14 моделей без рассуждений и 8 моделей с рассуждениями, выявляя, что CoT не является универсальным решением и может снижать производительность на задачах восприятия. Исследование показывает, что текущие мультимодальные модели рассуждений демонстрируют проблему сохранения зрительного анализа во время процесса рассуждения, постоянно теряя внимание к визуальной информации. Вывод: мультимодальный CoT эффективен для сложных рассуждений, но требует улучшения способности поддерживать глубокий анализ визуальной информации на протяжении всего процесса.

en.title: Unlocking the Potential of Multimodal Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
en.desc: This paper explores the effectiveness of Multimodal Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning in various tasks, particularly focusing on its limitations in visual reasoning. The authors evaluate 12 multimodal tasks and compare the performance of reasoning models against non-reasoning models. They find that while CoT enhances reasoning in mathematical and scientific contexts, it can hinder performance in perception tasks like visual grounding. The study highlights that current models struggle with maintaining visual introspection, indicating a need for more balanced approaches in multimodal reasoning.

zh.title: 多模态链式思维推理的有效性与局限性
zh.desc: 这篇论文探讨了多模态链式思维推理在不同任务中的有效性及其局限性。研究发现，链式思维推理在视觉感知任务中可能导致性能下降，而在数学和科学推理任务中则表现良好。现有的多模态推理模型在整体性能上仅有边际改善，可能是因为过于强调数学推理。最后，视觉推理仍然是多模态链式思维的瓶颈，模型在视觉反思方面的能力不足。

papers.title: Improved Large Language Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Abstract Masked diffusion language models with fully bidirectional attention outperform autoregressive counterparts on various benchmarks while maintaining competitiveness with established models.  Generated by Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct Modern large language models are predominantly trained with autoregressive factorization and causal attention. We present iLLaDA, an 8B masked diffusion language model trained from scratch with fully bidirectional attention. iLLaDA keeps the masked diffusion objective throughout pre-training and supervised fine-tuning (SFT), scaling pre-training to 12T tokens and fine-tuning on a 25B-token instruction corpus for 12 epochs. We further use variable-length generation for efficiency and introduce confidence-based scoring for multiple-choice evaluation. Compared with LLaDA, iLLaDA improves broadly across general, mathematical, and code benchmarks; for example, iLLaDA-Base improves by 21.6 points on BBH and 14.9 points on ARC-Challenge, while iLLaDA-Instruct improves by 14.5 points on MATH and 16.5 points on HumanEval. Despite its non-autoregressive training, iLLaDA also remains competitive with Qwen2.5 7B on several benchmarks. These results show that fully bidirectional diffusion training from scratch is a competitive path toward strong language models. Model weights and codes: https://github.com/ML-GSAI/LLaDA.
affiliations: Beijing Key Laboratory of Research on Large Models and Intelligent Governance
Engineering Research Center of Next-Generation Intelligent Search and Recommendation, MOE
Gaoling School of Artificial Intelligence, Renmin University of China

ru.title: Двусторонняя диффузия как альтернатива авторегрессии в языковых моделях
ru.desc: В статье представлена iLLaDA — 8-миллиардная модель на основе masked diffusion с полностью двусторонним вниманием (bidirectional attention), которая обучена с нуля вместо традиционного авторегрессивного подхода. Модель обучалась на 12 триллионах токенов с использованием маскированной диффузионной objective и дополнительно файн-тюнилась на 25 миллиардах токенов инструкций. Результаты показывают значительные улучшения на различных бенчмарках: на BBH на 21.6 пункта, на MATH на 14.5 пункта, на HumanEval на 16.5 пункта по сравнению с предыдущей версией. Исследование доказывает, что двусторонняя диффузионная тренировка является конкурентоспособной альтернативой классическому авторегрессивному обучению для создания мощных языковых моделей.

en.title: iLLaDA: A New Era of Bidirectional Diffusion Language Models
en.desc: This paper introduces iLLaDA, a novel masked diffusion language model that utilizes fully bidirectional attention, contrasting with the traditional autoregressive models. iLLaDA is trained from scratch on a massive dataset, employing a masked diffusion objective throughout both pre-training and supervised fine-tuning. The model demonstrates significant performance improvements across various benchmarks, including general knowledge, mathematics, and coding tasks, outperforming its predecessor LLaDA. The findings suggest that non-autoregressive training can yield competitive language models, challenging the dominance of autoregressive approaches.

zh.title: 完全双向扩散训练，构建强大语言模型的新路径
zh.desc: 本文介绍了一种新的语言模型iLLaDA，它采用了完全双向的注意力机制，并通过掩蔽扩散训练方法进行训练。与传统的自回归模型相比，iLLaDA在多个基准测试中表现更好，尤其是在数学和代码生成方面。该模型在预训练阶段使用了12万亿个标记，并在25亿个指令语料库上进行了监督微调。研究结果表明，从零开始进行完全双向的扩散训练是一种有效的构建强大语言模型的方法。

papers.title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to Agentic AI: From Foundations to Systems
papers.abstract: Abstract The book provides a comprehensive guide to building autonomous AI systems, covering foundational elements like transformer architecture and training methods, along with advanced topics such as reinforcement learning, agent architectures, and production deployment.  Generated by Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct The Hitchhiker's Guide to Agentic AI is a comprehensive practitioner's reference for building autonomous AI systems. The book covers the full stack from first principles to production deployment, organized around a central thesis: building great agentic systems requires understanding every layer of the pipeline, not just one. The book opens with the LLM substrate -- transformer architecture, GPU systems, training and fine-tuning (SFT,LoRA, MoE), model compression, and inference optimization -- treated as essential foundations rather than the primary focus. It then develops the alignment and reasoning layer: reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF), PPO, DPO and its variants, GRPO, reward modeling, and RL for large reasoning models including chain-of-thought and test-time scaling. The second half is devoted to agentic AI proper. Topics include agentic training and trajectory-based RL, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG and Agentic RAG), memory systems (in-context, external, episodic, and semantic), agent harness design and context management, and a taxonomy of agent design patterns. Inter-agent coordination is covered in depth: the Model Context Protocol (MCP), agent skills and tool use, the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) communication protocol, and multi-agent architectures spanning centralized, decentralized, and hierarchical topologies. The book concludes with agent development frameworks, agentic UI design, evaluation methodology for agentic tasks, and production deployment. Each chapter pairs rigorous theoretical foundations with implementation guidance, code examples, and references to the primary literature.

ru.title: От трансформеров к многоагентным системам: полный путь разработки автономного AI
ru.desc: Книга представляет полный гайд по разработке автономных систем на основе больших языковых моделей, начиная с фундаментальных основ архитектуры трансформеров и методов обучения. В ней подробно рассматриваются продвинутые техники, включая обучение с подкреплением, архитектуры агентов и оптимизацию вывода моделей. Особое внимание уделено выравниванию моделей через RLHF, PPO и другие методы контроля поведения AI систем. Вторая часть книги фокусируется на практическом проектировании многоагентных систем, включая память, коммуникацию между агентами и развертывание в продакшене.

en.title: Mastering the Layers of Autonomous AI Systems
en.desc: This paper presents a detailed guide for creating autonomous AI systems, emphasizing the importance of understanding all layers of the development pipeline. It covers foundational topics such as transformer architecture and various training methods, including supervised fine-tuning and model compression. Advanced concepts like reinforcement learning from human feedback and agent architectures are also explored, providing insights into building effective agentic systems. The book serves as a practical reference, combining theory with implementation strategies to facilitate the deployment of these AI systems in real-world applications.

zh.title: 构建自主AI系统的全面指南
zh.desc: 这本书是关于构建自主人工智能系统的全面指南，涵盖了从基础到高级的多个主题。书中介绍了变换器架构、训练方法、强化学习等关键概念，并强调了理解整个系统管道的重要性。它还探讨了智能体的设计、协调和部署，提供了丰富的理论基础和实践指导。每一章都结合了代码示例和相关文献，帮助读者更好地理解和应用这些技术。

papers.title: Autodata: An agentic data scientist to create high quality synthetic data
papers.abstract: Abstract Autodata enables AI agents to function as data scientists who create high-quality training data through meta-optimization, demonstrating improved performance across multiple task domains.  Generated by Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct We introduce Autodata, a general method that enables AI agents to act as data scientists who build high quality training and evaluation data. We show how to train (meta-optimize) such a data scientist agent, so that it learns to create even stronger data. We describe the overall formulation, and a specific practical implementation, Agentic Self-Instruct. We conduct experiments on computer science research tasks, legal reasoning tasks and reasoning with mathematical objects, where we obtain improved results compared to classical synthetic dataset creation methods. Further, meta-optimizing the data scientist agent itself delivers an even larger performance uplift. Agentic data creation provides a way to convert increased inference compute into higher quality model training. Overall, we believe this direction has the potential to change the way we build AI data.

ru.title: Агент-учёный: как ИИ создаёт сам себе идеальные данные для обучения
ru.desc: В статье представляется Autodata — метод, который позволяет AI агентам действовать как специалистам по науке о данных, создавая высокачественные тренировочные и оценочные датасеты. Авторы предлагают подход к мета-оптимизации такого агента, благодаря которому он обучается генерировать ещё более качественные данные, и описывают конкретную реализацию под названием Agentic Self-Instruct. Экспериментальные результаты на задачах компьютерной науки, юридического анализа и математического рассуждения показывают превосходство предложенного метода над классическими подходами синтетической генерации датасетов. Мета-оптимизация самого агента приводит к дополнительному повышению производительности моделей.

en.title: Empowering AI Agents to Create Superior Training Data
en.desc: The paper introduces Autodata, a method that allows AI agents to function as data scientists, generating high-quality training and evaluation datasets. It focuses on meta-optimization, where the AI agent learns to improve its own data creation processes, leading to better performance in various tasks. The authors demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach through experiments in fields like computer science and legal reasoning, showing significant improvements over traditional dataset creation methods. By enhancing the data generation process, the paper suggests a transformative potential for how AI training data is developed.

zh.title: 让AI代理成为数据科学家，提升训练数据质量
zh.desc: 本文介绍了一种名为Autodata的方法，使得人工智能代理能够像数据科学家一样创建高质量的训练数据。通过元优化技术，我们可以训练这些代理，使其生成更强的数据，从而提高模型的性能。我们在计算机科学、法律推理和数学对象推理等任务上进行了实验，结果显示与传统的合成数据集创建方法相比，性能得到了显著提升。此外，元优化数据科学代理本身也能带来更大的性能提升。

papers.title: TryOnCrafter: Unleashing Camera Trajectories for Realistic Video Virtual Try-on via a Renderable 4D Try-on Proxy
papers.abstract: Abstract Camera-controllable video virtual try-on framework uses a 4D proxy with explicit human-environment decoupling and DiT-based video generation for omnidirectional viewing.  Generated by Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct While Video Virtual Try-on (VVT) has achieved remarkable progress in synthesizing realistic garment overlays on dynamic subjects, existing paradigms remains fundamentally constrained by a passive dependency on source camera trajectories, failing to accommodate the requisite interactive freedom for omnidirectional viewpoint exploration. To address this limitation, we define a pioneering research frontier: Camera-controllable Video Virtual Try-on (CaM-VVT). Unlike conventional VVT, CaM-VVT not only necessitates viewpoint-agnostic texture hallucination but also strict structural synchronization between non-rigid human dynamics and background contexts under arbitrary, unconstrained camera movements. To tackle these challenges, we present TryOnCrafter, the first unified DiT-based framework specifically architected for the CaM-VVT task. Departing from implicit pixel-space manipulation, we introduce a Renderable 4D Try-on Proxy that explicitly decouples the human subject from the environment. This is achieved by distilling high-fidelity 2D try-on priors into a clothed 3DGS-based avatar, which is subsequently animated via SMPL-X sequences and metric-aligned into a reconstructed background point cloud. This proxy establishes a robust structural foundation with superior texture density and motion integrity. Our Proxy-Anchored Video DiT leverages this robust structural foundation as a primary geometric anchor, ensuring that the synthesized photorealistic videos are strictly constrained by prescribed trajectories and physically plausible deformations. Benefiting from the inherent editability of the 4D proxy, TryOnCrafter facilitates diverse downstream applications, including human relocalization, ``bullet time'' effects, and 360-degree orbital viewing.
affiliations: Institute of Computing Technology, Chinese Academy of Sciences
University of Chinese Academy of Sciences

ru.title: Управляемая камерой виртуальная примерка видео через 4D прокси с явным разделением человека и среды
ru.desc: В работе предлагается новая задача управляемой камерой виртуальной примерки одежды на видео (CaM-VVT), которая позволяет интерактивно менять точку зрения во время синтеза видео с одеждой на движущемся человеке. Авторы представляют фреймворк TryOnCrafter, основанный на диффузионных трансформерах (DiT), который использует 4D прокси-модель с явным разделением человека и окружения для обеспечения структурной консистентности. Ключевая инновация — это отрендеривируемый 4D прокси, созданный путём дистилляции 2D приоров примерки в аватар на основе 3D гауссовых сплатов, анимируемый последовательностями SMPL-X и встроенный в облако точек фона. Фреймворк гарантирует синтез фотореалистичных видео, которые строго соответствуют заданным траекториям камеры и физически правдоподобным деформациям.

en.title: Revolutionizing Virtual Try-Ons with Interactive Camera Control
en.desc: The paper introduces a new framework called Camera-controllable Video Virtual Try-on (CaM-VVT) that enhances the traditional video virtual try-on (VVT) by allowing users to interactively explore different viewpoints. It addresses the limitations of existing methods that rely on fixed camera paths by using a 4D proxy to decouple the human subject from the environment, enabling dynamic and realistic garment overlays. The framework employs a DiT-based approach to ensure that the generated videos maintain structural synchronization between the human dynamics and the background, even with arbitrary camera movements. This innovative method not only improves the realism of virtual try-ons but also opens up new possibilities for applications like human relocalization and immersive viewing experiences.

zh.title: 相机可控的虚拟试穿新纪元
zh.desc: 这篇论文提出了一种新的相机可控视频虚拟试穿框架，称为CaM-VVT。与传统的视频虚拟试穿不同，CaM-VVT允许在任意相机视角下进行互动，解决了以往方法对相机轨迹的被动依赖。论文中介绍了TryOnCrafter，这是第一个专门为CaM-VVT任务设计的统一DiT框架，能够将人类动态与背景环境进行严格同步。通过使用可渲染的4D试穿代理，论文实现了高保真度的服装合成，并支持多种下游应用。

papers.title: EBench: Elemental Diagnosis of Generalist Mobile Manipulation Policies
papers.abstract: Abstract EBench is a comprehensive simulation benchmark for evaluating generalist mobile manipulation policies across diverse tasks and dimensions, revealing distinct capability profiles and generalization patterns among state-of-the-art models.  Generated by Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct We present EBench, a simulation benchmark that diagnoses generalist mobile manipulation policies beyond a single success-rate scalar. EBench comprises 26 diverse and challenging manipulation tasks annotated along 5 capability dimensions and 4 generalization dimensions. We evaluate state-of-the-art generalist manipulation models including π_0, π_{0.5}, XVLA, and InternVLA-A1, and reveal that models with near success rates exhibit strikingly different capability profiles: π_{0.5} achieves the highest test success rate and the best train--test retention, whereas InternVLA-A1 dominates mobile manipulation but collapses on dexterous tasks, and XVLA exhibits strengths on a disjoint set of atomic skills compared to other policies. Beyond capability profiling, EBench analyzes the generalization ability from 4 representative perspectives, identifying the impact of different distribution shift factors. The results reveal strengths and weaknesses of models behind an overall score. We hope this benchmark offers a broad set of diagnostic signals to guide iteration on generalist manipulation models.
affiliations: Institute for AI Industry Research (AIR), Tsinghua University
University of Science and Technology of China

ru.title: Диагностика скрытых возможностей робототехнических моделей через многомерный анализ
ru.desc: EBench — это комплексный бенчмарк для оценки обобщённых политик манипулирования мобильными роботами, который выходит за рамки единственной метрики успешности. Бенчмарк содержит 26 разнообразных задач манипулирования, аннотированных по 5 измерениям способностей и 4 измерениям обобщаемости. Авторы исследуют современные модели (π_0, π_0.5, XVLA, InternVLA-A1) и обнаруживают, что модели с похожим уровнем успеха имеют принципиально разные профили компетентности, со своими сильными и слабыми сторонами. Бенчмарк анализирует способность к обобщению с четырёх перспектив, выявляя влияние различных факторов сдвига распределения данных.

en.title: EBench: Unveiling the Strengths and Weaknesses of Mobile Manipulation Models
en.desc: EBench is a new benchmark designed to evaluate mobile manipulation policies in a detailed way. It includes 26 different tasks and assesses models based on five capability dimensions and four generalization dimensions. The study shows that even models with similar success rates can have very different strengths and weaknesses in specific tasks. By analyzing these models, EBench aims to provide insights that can help improve the development of generalist manipulation systems.

zh.title: EBench：通用移动操控的全面评估基准
zh.desc: EBench是一个全面的模拟基准，用于评估通用移动操控策略在多样任务和维度上的表现。它包含26个多样且具有挑战性的操控任务，并在5个能力维度和4个泛化维度上进行了标注。通过评估最先进的通用操控模型，EBench揭示了不同模型在成功率相近的情况下，能力特征却截然不同的情况。该基准不仅提供能力分析，还从多个角度分析模型的泛化能力，帮助指导通用操控模型的迭代。

papers.title: Causal-rCM: A Unified Teacher-Forcing and Self-Forcing Open Recipe for Autoregressive Diffusion Distillation in Streaming Video Generation and Interactive World Models
papers.abstract: Abstract Autoregressive video diffusion extends diffusion distillation frameworks to real-time streaming generation through causal training paradigms, achieving state-of-the-art performance with fast convergence and interactive world modeling capabilities.  Generated by Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct Autoregressive video diffusion with causal diffusion transformers has emerged as a major paradigm for real-time streaming video generation and action-conditioned interactive world models. In this work, we extend rCM, an advanced diffusion distillation framework, to autoregressive video diffusion. The core philosophy of rCM lies in the complementarity between forward and reverse divergences, represented by consistency models (CMs) and distribution matching distillation (DMD), respectively, in diffusion distillation. This philosophy naturally carries over to the autoregressive setting, where teacher-forcing (TF) provides an offline, forward-divergence causal training paradigm, while self-forcing (SF) corresponds to an on-policy, reverse-divergence refinement.   Our contributions are: (1) through extensive experiments, we show that teacher-forcing CM is currently the best complement to self-forcing DMD as an initialization strategy (2) we present the first implementation of teacher-forcing-based continuous-time CMs (e.g., sCM/MeanFlow) for autoregressive video diffusion, enabled by our custom-mask FlashAttention-2 JVP kernel, achieving 10times faster convergence compared to discrete-time CMs (dCMs) (3) we introduce Causal-rCM, a leading, unified, and scalable algorithm-infrastructure open recipe for diffusion distillation and causal training (4) we achieve state-of-the-art streaming video generation performance in both frame-wise and chunk-wise settings, using only synthetic data for training.   Notably, our distilled 2-step causal Wan2.1-1.3B model achieves a VBench-T2V score of 84.63 with only 1 or 2 sampling steps. We further apply Causal-rCM to Cosmos 3, an advanced omnimodal world foundation model for physical AI with action-conditioned generation capability, enabling an interactive world model.

ru.title: Причинная дистилляция для быстрой потоковой генерации видео
ru.desc: В работе предложен метод Causal-rCM, расширяющий framework дистилляции диффузионных моделей на авторегрессивную генерацию видео в реальном времени. Ключевая идея основана на дополнительности прямой дивергенции (teacher-forcing с моделями консистентности) и обратной дивергенции (self-forcing с distribution matching дистилляцией). Авторы реализовали непрерывные модели консистентности для авторегрессивного режима с оптимизированным ядром FlashAttention-2, что достигает 10-кратного ускорения сходимости. Метод демонстрирует state-of-the-art результаты в генерации потокового видео с синтетическими данными, достигая высокого качества всего за 1-2 шага семплирования.

en.title: Revolutionizing Real-Time Video Generation with Autoregressive Diffusion
en.desc: This paper presents a new method called autoregressive video diffusion, which improves real-time video generation using advanced machine learning techniques. It builds on a framework known as diffusion distillation, combining two training approaches: teacher-forcing and self-forcing, to enhance model performance. The authors demonstrate that their method achieves faster convergence and better results in generating streaming videos compared to previous models. Additionally, they introduce a scalable algorithm called Causal-rCM, which can be applied to various tasks, including interactive world modeling.

zh.title: 自回归视频扩散：实时生成的新范式
zh.desc: 自回归视频扩散将扩散蒸馏框架扩展到实时流生成，通过因果训练范式实现了快速收敛和交互式世界建模能力。本文提出了一种新的自回归视频扩散方法，结合了前向和反向散度的互补性，利用教师强制和自我强制的训练策略。我们通过大量实验验证了教师强制一致性模型在初始化策略中的优越性，并实现了基于教师强制的连续时间一致性模型。最终，我们的模型在流视频生成任务中达到了最先进的性能，展示了合成数据训练的潜力。

papers.title: RoPE-Aware Bit Allocation for KV-Cache Quantization
papers.abstract: Abstract Block-GTQ introduces a RoPE-aware bit allocation method for key-cache quantization that improves attention accuracy and downstream performance through adaptive bit distribution and packed cache serving.  Generated by Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct Existing low-bit KV-cache quantizers often treat each cached key as a flat vector. Under RoPE, however, a key's contribution to a future attention logit decomposes into a position-dependent sum over two-dimensional frequency blocks. This makes key-cache quantization a block-wise bit-allocation problem: high-energy RoPE blocks are more sensitive to quantization error and should receive more bits. We introduce Block-GTQ, a RoPE-aware bit allocator for key-cache quantization built on TurboQuant-MSE(TQ-MSE). For each layer and KV head, Block-GTQ computes a label-free energy score for each RoPE block and greedily allocates integer bit widths by marginal gain. Under matched K/V bit budgets, Block-GTQ better preserves RoPE query-key logits on a ten-model diagnostic panel, cutting per-layer MAE by 32-80% at 2 and 3 b/dim K-only quantization and winning all 367/367 layer comparisons against uniform TQ-MSE. These fidelity gains translate to stronger downstream long-context retrieval, understanding, and reasoning. At K2V2 on Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, Block-GTQ raises the six-task NIAH average from 70.6 to 97.4, and the LongBench-EN average from 36.87 to 53.31. On AIME 2024/2025 with DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B, without an fp16 recent-key buffer, Block-GTQ at K3V2 scores 51.7/37.5, close to fp16's 54.2/37.9, whereas uniform TQ-MSE collapses to 0.0/0.0. We further implement a packed-cache serving path. On a single H800 GPU with Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct, packed K3V3 achieves 3.24x KV-cache compression with fp16-comparable quality, runs 1.34x faster than fp16 FlashAttention2 at 128K context, reduces peak memory from 56.31 GB to 19.85 GB, and remains feasible at 256K and 512K where fp16 OOMs. Code is available at https://github.com/JIA-Lab-research/blockgtq.
affiliations: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology
The Chinese University of Hong Kong

ru.title: Умное сжатие памяти: RoPE-адаптивная квантизация KV-кеша для длинных контекстов
ru.desc: В статье предлагается Block-GTQ — метод квантизации KV-кеша, который учитывает структуру RoPE-позиционного кодирования для более эффективного распределения битов между различными частотными блоками. Авторы показывают, что высокоэнергетические RoPE-блоки более чувствительны к ошибкам квантизации и должны получать больше битов, чем низкоэнергетические. Предложенный алгоритм использует жадное распределение битов на основе оценки энергии каждого блока и значительно улучшает точность внимания — снижает среднюю абсолютную ошибку на 32-80% при 2-3 битах на размерность. Метод позволяет достичь 3.24x сжатия KV-кеша на GPU, сохраняя качество, сопоставимое с fp16, и обеспечивает 1.34x ускорение для длинных контекстов.

en.title: Optimizing Key-Cache Quantization with RoPE-Aware Bit Allocation
en.desc: The paper presents Block-GTQ, a novel method for key-cache quantization that enhances attention accuracy by using a RoPE-aware bit allocation strategy. Unlike traditional methods that treat cached keys as flat vectors, Block-GTQ recognizes the importance of position-dependent frequency blocks, allowing for more effective bit distribution. By calculating energy scores for RoPE blocks, it allocates bits based on their sensitivity to quantization errors, significantly reducing mean absolute error (MAE) in attention logits. This approach not only improves model performance on various tasks but also achieves efficient memory usage and faster processing speeds compared to existing methods.

zh.title: 基于RoPE的智能位分配，提升量化性能
zh.desc: Block-GTQ提出了一种基于RoPE的关键缓存量化位分配方法，通过自适应位分布和打包缓存服务来提高注意力准确性和下游性能。与传统的低位KV缓存量化器不同，Block-GTQ考虑了RoPE的影响，使得关键的贡献与位置相关，形成了一个基于块的位分配问题。该方法为每个RoPE块计算无标签的能量评分，并通过边际增益贪婪地分配整数位宽。实验结果表明，Block-GTQ在多个模型上显著提高了RoPE查询-关键的保真度，增强了长上下文的检索、理解和推理能力。

papers.title: Advancing WordArt-Oriented Scene Text Recognition: Datasets and Methods
papers.abstract: Abstract A large-scale synthetic dataset and specialized model architecture are introduced to address the challenges of artistic text recognition by improving data diversity and model flexibility for irregular text layouts.  Generated by Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct WordArt (artistic text) features highly customized fonts, textures, and layouts, making WordArt-oriented scene TExt Recognition (WATER) substantially more challenging than general Scene Text Recognition (STR). Existing STR datasets and methods, typically built around regular scene text and fixed-template inputs, struggle to scale to WATER. Thus, we aim to advance this task from both data and model perspectives. On the data side, we construct a 2M synthetic dataset, WATER-S, with the scale improved by hundreds of times compared to existing artistic text data. WATER-S consists of two complementary subsets. One rendered by an upgraded rendering pipeline (SynthWordArt), which provides highly accurate and controllable synthetic WordArt data. The other is generated by combining Qwen3-VL for prompt mining and Z-Image for image synthesis, which improves the coverage of realistic and diverse data. On the model side, we propose WATERec. It adopts an visual encoder supporting arbitrary-shaped inputs and an autoregressive decoder to model complex layouts, structurally breaking the bottleneck of fixed-template STR on WordArt. Experiments show that this architecture outperforms prior STR methods, achieving state-of-the-art performance on irregular texts such as WordArt. Together with WATER-R, carefully reorganized from existing real STR data, our strong baseline with the new synthetic data and model design reaches 90.40% accuracy on WordArt-Bench, surpassing both general-purpose and OCR-specialized vision-language models by a large margin. Code and data are available at https://github.com/YesianRohn/WATER.
affiliations: Institute of Trustworthy Embodied AI, Fudan University
Shanghai Key Laboratory of Multimodal Embodied AI, Fudan University

ru.title: Синтетические данные и гибкая архитектура для распознавания художественного текста
ru.desc: В работе представлен большой синтетический датасет WATER-S из 2 миллионов примеров и специализированная архитектура WATERec для распознавания художественного текста (WordArt) с нестандартными шрифтами и ориентациями. Синтетические данные получены двумя способами: через улучшенный pipeline SynthWordArt для точного контролируемого синтеза и через комбинацию vision-language модели Qwen3-VL и Z-Image для повышения разнообразия и реалистичности. Предложенная модель использует энкодер для обработки произвольных форм и авторегрессивный декодер для моделирования сложных структур текста, преодолевая ограничения фиксированных шаблонов традиционных методов распознавания. Метод достигает 90.40% точности на бенчмарке WordArt-Bench, значительно превосходя существующие методы распознавания текста и специализированные vision-language модели.

en.title: Revolutionizing Artistic Text Recognition with WATER-S and WATERec
en.desc: This paper introduces a new approach to recognizing artistic text, specifically focusing on irregular layouts found in WordArt. It presents a large synthetic dataset called WATER-S, which is significantly larger than previous datasets, enhancing the diversity of training data for machine learning models. The authors also propose a specialized model architecture, WATERec, which can handle arbitrary-shaped inputs and complex layouts, overcoming limitations of traditional scene text recognition methods. Experimental results demonstrate that this new model achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on artistic text recognition tasks, outperforming existing models.

zh.title: 突破艺术文本识别的瓶颈
zh.desc: 本文介绍了一种大规模合成数据集和专门的模型架构，以解决艺术文本识别的挑战。通过提高数据多样性和模型灵活性，本文提出的WATER任务比一般的场景文本识别更具挑战性。我们构建了一个包含200万条合成数据的WATER-S数据集，显著提升了艺术文本数据的规模。新提出的WATERec模型采用支持任意形状输入的视觉编码器和自回归解码器，成功突破了固定模板场景文本识别的瓶颈。
